label: 1579 CE
era_summary: Year 1579 (MDLXXIX) was a common year starting on Thursday of the Julian calendar, and a common year starting on Monday of the Proleptic Gregorian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Brecke records no major conflicts touching this region in 1579 (safety scored at the era baseline of 85). No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1579: Netherlands-Spain, 1566-1609; Turkey-Spain, 1569-80; Portugal-Malabar, 1575-85. Maddison records GDP/capita 1450 (ESP, 1579) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

francia.summary: Active conflicts in 1579: Netherlands-Spain, 1566-1609; Spain-Netherlands (with intervention from France and England), 1578-1587. Maddison records GDP/capita 3181 (NLD, 1579) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

england.summary: Active conflicts in 1579: England-Munster (southern Ireland), 1569-83; Spain-Netherlands (with intervention from France and England), 1578-1587; England (Ireland, with intervention by pope, Spain), 1579-80.
